'''zashunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ixora|ixora]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-sh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ixora|ixora]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zashunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæshinith|zæshinith]] || [[word:zæshinij|zæshinij]] || [[word:zæshinish|zæshinish]] || [[word:zæshini|zæshini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zashushunuth|zashushunuth]] || [[word:zashushunuj|zashushunuj]] || [[word:zashushunush|zashushunush]] || [[word:zashushunu|zashushunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zashunuth|zashunuth]] || [[word:zashunuj|zashunuj]] || [[word:zashunush|zashunush]] || [[word:zashunu|zashunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zashufnuth|zashufnuth]] || [[word:zashufnuj|zashufnuj]] || [[word:zashufnush|zashufnush]] || [[word:zashufnuf|zashufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zashunuthu|zashunuthu]] || [[word:zashunuju|zashunuju]] || [[word:zashunushu|zashunushu]] || [[word:zashunuku|zashunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zashunuth|zashunuth]] || [[word:zashunuj|zashunuj]] || [[word:zashunush|zashunush]] || [[word:zashunu|zashunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zashunuthul|zashunuthul]] || [[word:zashunujul|zashunujul]] || [[word:zashunushul|zashunushul]] || [[word:zashunukul|zashunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zashunuthuthu|zashunuthuthu]] || [[word:zashunujuju|zashunujuju]] || [[word:zashunushushu|zashunushushu]] || [[word:zashunuku|zashunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zashunuthun|zashunuthun]] || [[word:zashunujun|zashunujun]] || [[word:zashunushun|zashunushun]] || [[word:zashunukun|zashunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zashunuthuoro|zashunuthuoro]] || [[word:zashunujuoro|zashunujuoro]] || [[word:zashunushuoro|zashunushuoro]] || [[word:zashunukuoro|zashunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
